title: Tenant Control Plane (Module 01)
description: Centralized tenant provisioning, namespace creation, quota allocation, billing integration, and environment isolation.

title: Provision isolated tenant namespace on demand
description: As a platform admin, when I submit a tenant creation request, the system allocates a logically isolated namespace, generates tenant-specific encryption keys, applies default quotas, and returns a tenant ID. AC: 1) Namespace created in K8s 2) RBAC defaults applied 3) Secret rotation scheduled 4) Tenant ID returned in <2s

title: Enforce logical isolation for tenant resources
description: Verify tenant A cannot access tenant B's vector stores, execution logs, or agent registries. Enforce namespace-level RBAC, resource tagging, and cross-tenant request blocking. AC: 1) Unit tests for cross-tenant leakage 2) Integration test with mock requests 3) Audit log on denied access

title: Agent Orchestration Engine (Module 03)
description: Core runtime engine for event-driven DAG execution, agent scheduling, state checkpointing, retry/timeout logic, and workflow replay.

title: Execute minimal DAG workflow with async nodes
description: Implement DAG executor supporting parallel branches, async node routing, and success/failure edges. Support checkpointing at node boundaries. AC: 1) YAML/JSON workflow definition parsed 2) Nodes execute concurrently where possible 3) State persisted after each node 4) Failure triggers retry policy

title: Implement resumable workflow state & replay
description: Persist workflow state to distributed storage. On failure/restart, resume from last checkpoint without re-executing completed nodes. Validate idempotency and deterministic replay. AC: 1) Checkpoint stored every N nodes 2) Replay API accepts workflow_id 3) State diff logged 4) MTTR <5 mins on simulated crash

title: Memory Fabric (Module 07)
description: Persistent organizational cognition layer supporting semantic, episodic, and graph memory with strict tenant isolation.

title: Store/retrieve semantic embeddings per tenant
description: Implement vector store abstraction with tenant-scoped collections. Support similarity search with metadata filters and confidence thresholds. AC: 1) Qdrant/Weaviate abstraction layer 2) Tenant filter enforced at query level 3) Index rebuild on schema change 4) P95 search <1s

title: Human Supervision Layer (Module 09)
description: Govern autonomous execution safely via approval chains, intervention controls, escalation paths, and human-in-the-loop review.

title: Configure sequential & parallel approval chains
description: As a Department Admin, I want to define approval chains for high-risk agent actions so execution only proceeds after human validation. AC: 1) UI/API to chain approvers 2) Sequential vs parallel routing 3) Approve/Reject/Clarify actions 4) TTL & auto-escalation

title: Human-in-the-loop intervention & state override
description: As a Supervisor, I want to pause an active workflow and inject corrective parameters so that I can prevent hallucinated execution or data corruption before it propagates downstream.

title: Model Abstraction Layer (Module 12)
description: Decouple orchestration from model vendors. Support routing, fallback, cost/latency optimization, and capability scoring.

title: Implement multi-provider model router with fallback
description: Abstract LLM calls behind a unified interface. Support dynamic routing based on task type, cost caps, and latency SLAs. Fallback to secondary provider on rate limit/error. AC: 1) Configurable provider pool 2) Circuit breaker on 429/5xx 3) Token cost tracking per call 4) P95 routing decision <50ms

title: Arabic Language Intelligence Layer (Module 19)
description: Strategic differentiator: Arabic-first embeddings, dialect normalization, Arabic OCR, terminology governance, and sovereign model routing.

title: Integrate Arabic-native embedding & retrieval pipeline
description: Deploy Arabic-optimized embedding model (e.g., Jais/AraBERT variants). Build dialect normalization pre-processor. Validate retrieval accuracy against English baseline. AC: 1) P95 embedding latency <300ms 2) Dialect normalization >92% accuracy 3) Tenant-scoped Arabic vector index 4) Cross-lingual query routing
